channel.title: War Report – Features
channel.description: Recent content in Features on War Report

item.title: Players
item.author: support@warreport.app (Colin Schmale)
item.description:
Player details, such as hero and troop levels, are displayed on the player page. For additional information, click one of the buttons in the top-right corner to access pages with detailed statistics on recent Clan Wars and the Legend League.

Search players

To search for a player, click on the button in the bottom right corner of the players page. You can search players by tag or by name. The search by name is based on data provided by the ClashKing Discord bot and may not include all players.

The image below shows where you can find the player tag. Click on your experience (1) to open your profile (2), and then copy the tag (3) below your name.

Bookmark players

Bookmark your favorite players by clicking the bookmark button in the top-right corner of their detail page. To remove a bookmark, simply click the button again or swipe the player entry in your bookmarks list to the left or right. You can also rearrange your bookmarks to keep them organized: tap and hold any item, then drag it to the desired position.

Battle

This page displays the player’s Battle log, ranking, and league history, covering normal attacks, ranked attacks, and Legend League attacks.

Attacks

This page lists every clan war and CWL attack and defense the player has made. Use the filter at the top to include or exclude friendly wars.

Stats

The Stats page presents aggregated war and CWL performance statistics over a selected time period.

Previous Clans

This page shows previous clans the player has been a member of and the total time spent in each clan.

Achievements

The Achievements page displays the player’s progress across all in-game achievements, organized by category (Home Village, Builder Base, Clan Capital).

Armies

The Armies tab shows every army composition the player has used in their recent battle log, grouped by dominant troop. This includes Home Village, ranked, and Legend League battles. Each card displays the troop composition, average stars, average destruction, and total number of attacks.

When a player has used multiple variations of the same dominant-troop army (e.g. several different Dragon compositions), a variants button appears. Tapping it opens a sheet listing each variant with its own stats.

Every army card has an Open in-game button, letting you copy that exact composition into the game with a single tap.

item.title: Clans
item.author: support@warreport.app (Colin Schmale)
item.description:
Clan details, such as a list of all members and the number of wins, losses, and ties in clan wars, are displayed on the clan page. For additional information, click one of the buttons in the top-right corner to access pages with detailed statistics on recent Clan Wars, the Clan War League, and the Clan Capital.

Search clans

To search a clan, click on the button in the bottom right corner of the clans page. You can search clans by tag or by name.

The image below shows where you can find the clan tag. Click on your experience (1) to open your profile, then click on your clan (2), and then copy the tag (3) below your name.

Bookmark clans

Bookmark your favorite clans by clicking the bookmark button in the top-right corner of their detail page. To remove a bookmark, simply click the button again or swipe the clan entry in your bookmarks list to the left or right. You can also rearrange your bookmarks to keep them organized: tap and hold any item, then drag it to the desired position.

War log

This page displays the clan’s Clan War and CWL results.

Stats

The Stats page presents aggregated war and CWL performance statistics over a selected time period for the clan and all of its members.

Raid Weekend

This page tracks your clan’s Clan Capital performance, showing detailed statistics for each raid weekend.

item.title: Clan Wars
item.author: support@warreport.app (Colin Schmale)
item.description:
The Wars tab displays ongoing clan wars of your bookmarked players and clans. Use the filter in the top right corner if you only want to see specific war types. You can also exclude individual clans or players from the list. If you have many bookmarks, loading the list may take longer, so use the filter to select the wars you are interested in. As soon as a player or clan is at war, you will also find a button at the bottom of the player or clan page that will take you to the clan war page.


For friendly wars and regular clan wars, your clan must have a public war log. If your war log is private, ask your leader to change the clan settings. For the Clan War League, a public war log is not required.

Past wars

The app also provides details of past clan wars. Simply click on an entry in the war log to view them. The data is provided by the ClashKing Discord bot. Please note that some clan wars may not have been tracked by ClashKing.

item.title: Clan War League
item.author: support@warreport.app (Colin Schmale)
item.description:
If a clan war belongs to the Clan War League, you will find a button at the bottom of the clan war page that will take you to the clan war league page. For additional information about a clan or player, click on an item in the group or player list.

What’s on the page

  • Group standings for the clans in the group with stars and destruction.
  • Round results for each of the seven war days.
  • Player rankings for the entire group, sortable by stars, destruction, or attacks used.
  • Clan and player stats when you tap on an individual clan or player.
  • Earned medals (both base medals and bonus medals) per clan and per player. See How are Clan War League medals calculated? for the math behind these numbers.

Past seasons

The app also provides details of past Clan War League seasons. Simply click on an entry in the war log to view them. The data is provided by the ClashKing Discord bot. Please note that some Clan War League months may not have been tracked by ClashKing.

item.title: Clan Capital
item.author: support@warreport.app (Colin Schmale)
item.description:
Click the menu button in the top right corner of the clan page to access this information. This page tracks your clan’s Clan Capital performance, showing detailed statistics for each Raid Weekend.

For the math behind raid medal payouts, see How are Raid Weekend rewards calculated?.

Summary

Overall metrics for the weekend — total raid medals earned, attacks used, districts destroyed, and Capital Gold looted. The list of your members shows each player’s attacks and individual stats.

Attacks

A breakdown of every clan you raided, with the districts destroyed in each, the medals earned, and how the attacks were distributed across your members.

Defenses

How attacking clans performed against your Clan Capital, including which districts they destroyed and the medals you earned in defense.

item.title: Battle
item.author: support@warreport.app (Colin Schmale)
item.description:
Open the player page and click the battle log button in the top-right corner to access this information. The Battle page shows the player’s recent battle log, ranking, and league history. It covers normal battles, ranked battles, and the Legend League.

Log

The Log tab lists every recent attack and defense, with stars, destruction, opponent, looted resources, and the army composition used.

Each attack entry in the battle log shows the full army composition used. A filter button on the battle log lets you filter entries by army type (Air or Ground) or by specific troops, spells, siege machines, or hero equipment, making it easy to find all attacks where a particular troop or strategy was used.

Ranking

When the player is not in the Legend League, the Ranking tab shows the current standing within the player’s group.

When the player is in the Legend League, this tab is replaced by a Legend League tab that shows trophy progression for the current season.

History

The History tab displays the player’s league progression over time, including past ranked league finishes and Legend League seasons.

item.title: Legend League
item.author: support@warreport.app (Colin Schmale)
item.description:
Click the button in the top right corner of the player page to access this information. This page displays the player’s Legend League performance for the current and previous seasons. It shows trophies gained and lost per day along with a graph visualizing trophy progression throughout the month.


The information may not include all attacks and defenses. The app only tracks players while they are in the top 200 of their country.

item.title: Popular Armies
item.author: support@warreport.app (Colin Schmale)
item.description:
Open the Popular Armies page from the More menu. It lists the most used army compositions of the top 200 Legend League players. Each card shows the dominant troop name, total usage count, average stars, and average destruction. Tapping an army opens a detail page listing Legend League players who used it, sorted by average stars and destruction.

Army link

Each army card has an Open in-game button that copies the exact composition into the game with a single tap.

item.title: Account
item.author: support@warreport.app (Colin Schmale)
item.description:
Creating an account in the app settings unlocks additional features. You can sign in with email and password, your Discord account, or your Apple ID.

Cross-Device Sync

Your bookmarked players, clans, and other settings are automatically synchronized across all devices where you’re signed in. This makes it easy to switch between your phone and tablet without losing track of your favorite clans and players.

Notifications

Accounts enable push notifications to keep you informed about important clan activities. For example, you will receive a notification if you still need to attack in war, helping you never miss your chance to contribute. Notification preferences can be customized in the app settings to match your needs.

Notification preferences can be customized in the app settings to match your needs.

Deleting your account

You can delete your account at any time from the app’s More menu, or via warreport.app/more. Deleting your account removes your synced data from the backend; see the Privacy Policy for details on retention.

item.title: API
item.author: support@warreport.app (Colin Schmale)
item.description:
There’s a public API at https://api.warreport.app that serves additional Legend League and army statistics. The full contract is published as an OpenAPI 3.1 spec.

What’s available

Each endpoint serves an end-of-season snapshot from the Legend League:

  • Legend League rankings: global player and clan rankings, plus per-country breakdowns.
  • Popular armies: the most-used army compositions among the top 200 Legend League players, with average stars and destruction.
  • Heroes and hero equipment: usage statistics for heroes and hero equipment among top Legend League players.

No API key is required. The data is free to use for anything. If the data shows up somewhere public, please credit War Report by mentioning the app and linking to https://warreport.app.

If you build something with it, I’d love to hear about it. Drop a message in the Discord server.
